scripts.build: pnpm --filter @picket/core build && pnpm --filter @picket/api build && pnpm --filter @picket/query build && pnpm --filter @picket/sigma-engine build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @picket/core build && pnpm --filter @picket/api build && pnpm --filter @picket/query build && pnpm --filter @picket/sigma-engine build && vitest run --passWithNoTests
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @picket/core build && pnpm --filter @picket/api build && pnpm --filter @picket/query build && pnpm --filter @picket/sigma-engine build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
